perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit bedroom where a woman in floral pajamas is sitting on a yellow-covered bed, checking her phone. (2) In a parking garage, a man in a striped shirt stands next to a black electric scooter, gesturing as he talks to the camera; he later puts on a helmet. (3) The couple is seen at the National Palace Museum plaza under a clear blue sky, posing with peace signs. (4) Inside an art gallery, they walk past large paintings and museum labels, specifically looking at Impressionist works from The MET collection. (5) The video concludes with the couple back outside, smiling and talking directly to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a man's voice waking a woman up, followed by upbeat, mid-tempo electronic BGM. (2) In the garage, the man's voice has a slight reverb as he explains the rules of their '1st and 15th' date days. (3) Outside, ambient wind noise is audible over their conversation as they arrive at the museum. (4) In the exhibition hall, the environment becomes quiet and reverent, with the man's narration describing the paintings they see. (5) The upbeat music continues to the end as the couple exchanges final playful remarks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '妖起床出門了 快點' (Get up and go out now), setting an energetic tone. (2) Decorative Hook: '老夫妻 · 初一 · 十五小約會 #01' appears as a consistent series title throughout. (3) Functional Text: '從現在開始 每個月的初一 十五 就是我們夫妻的約會日' explaining the recurring tradition. (4) Descriptive Text: Labels for paintings like '梵谷真跡耶!' (It's a real Van Gogh!) and '美國大都會博物館名作展' (The MET Masterpieces Exhibition).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro in bedroom -> Concept explanation in garage -> Museum visit and art viewing -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female creator, approximately 4 other museum visitors in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian couple; the man wears a grey striped t-shirt and grey shorts, the woman wears a black t-shirt with 'HAHABABY' branding and light blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern home bedroom, a concrete underground parking lot, the classical Chinese architecture of the National Palace Museum, and a modern art exhibition hall with colored walls.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight outdoors and soft studio/gallery lighting indoors.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle vlog documenting a couple's intentional 'date day' tradition. It aims to share their relationship dynamic and promote the current art exhibition at the National Palace Museum while maintaining a casual, relatable creator-audience connection.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The woman is wearing a t-shirt with the logo 'HAHABABY', which is the creators' own brand, and they are prominently featuring a specific museum exhibition.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Series title #01 indicating a new recurring vlog series.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows the 'day in the life' vlog format popular among Taiwanese influencers, characterized by high-density captions and personal commentary.
